name: Lucas Torres Santana
title: Head of Staking at Hashdex
tagline: Theoretical physicist turned crypto infrastructure builder. Bridging rigorous science and decentralized finance.
about: I hold a PhD in Theoretical Physics from the Federal University of Rio de Janeiro (UFRJ), where I studied wave propagation in curved spacetimes — the mathematics underlying gravitational waves and light in general relativistic backgrounds. After a decade of academic research, I transitioned into the cryptocurrency industry, applying the same rigorous, first-principles thinking to staking infrastructure and digital asset management at Hashdex, one of Brazil's leading crypto asset managers. I thrive at the intersection of deep technical theory and real-world systems.
